  3. Mercedes-AMG Formula 1 Car

Mercedes-AMG Formula 1 Car

Overview

High-detail CAD reconstruction of a modern Formula 1 car developed through image-based reference and reverse engineering, focusing on dimensional accuracy and advanced surface modeling.

Specifications

  • Model Type: Full vehicle assembly
  • Source: Image reference + reverse engineering
  • Focus: High-detail surface modeling
  • Accuracy: Dimensionally consistent proportions

Design Constraints

  • Reconstruct complex aerodynamic geometry from limited reference data
  • Maintain proportional accuracy across full vehicle assembly
  • Ensure smooth surface continuity across interconnected components
  • Handle high geometric complexity without surface breakdown

Design Approach

The model was developed using a combination of reference-based reconstruction and reverse engineering techniques to capture the overall geometry and aerodynamic form of a modern Formula 1 car.

Advanced surface modeling tools were extensively used to achieve smooth transitions, complex curvature, and high-detail component integration across the full assembly.

Key Features

  • Full vehicle assembly with integrated components
  • Extremely detailed surface modeling across aerodynamic elements
  • High geometric complexity with clean surface continuity
  • Accurate representation of modern Formula 1 design language

Outcome

Delivered a dimensionally accurate and visually refined Formula 1 car assembly, demonstrating advanced CAD capability in handling complex surface geometry and large-scale assemblies.

Project information

  • Category Independent Project
  • Project date November, 2025
  • Project URL https://grabcad.com/library/mercedes-amg-formula-1-car-1
  • Workflow Recording YouTube Playlist
  • Download CAD Files
